name: entroly
description: Cut your Claude / OpenAI / Gemini bill 70–95% on AI coding. Local proxy that compresses context, keeps provider caches hot, and verifies LLM output ($0 hallucination guard). Drop-in for Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Aider + 34 more and custom providers — 30s, no code changes
summaryZh: Cut your Claude / OpenAI / Gemini bill 70–95% on AI coding. Local proxy that compresses context, keeps provider caches hot, and verifies LLM output ($0 hallucination guard). Drop-in for Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Aider + 34 more and custom providers — 30s, no code changes 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
